title: Skill Audit Finding
description: Binding shape for a single skill-audit finding — `skill-audit.finding/v1`. Project-owned per ADR-0016 surface #5 (migrated from the workspace docs/reference/skill-audit-pipeline.md § Unified Finding Schema on 2026-06-02, SH-6608). All active skill-audit outputs emit or convert to this shape so findings are comparable, severity-tagged, and traceable across the v2.2 loop, the v2.1-compat loop, and the legacy-474 archive. Severity uses the canonical P0..P4 scale (workspace AGENTS.md § Canonical Severity Schema). The prose source-of-truth + mapping rules live in docs/reference/skill-audit-pipeline.md, which now defers to this schema for the field shape.

schemaVersion.description: Fixed schema tag for this finding shape.

pipeline.description: Which audit pipeline produced the finding. v2.2 = current per-skill loop; v2.1-compat = compatibility loop (same four artifact files, no new schema branch); legacy-474-archive = the 474-finding archive (converts by link only, never writes new live findings).

skill.description: Skill slug or bundle owner the finding is about.

findingId.description: Stable local identifier such as F1, CC-3, or a legacy task code.

severity.description: Canonical severity (P0 CRITICAL .. P4 INFO) per the workspace Canonical Severity Schema.

category.description: Audited class of the finding. DISPLACEMENT = the skill's capability is now superseded by a newer first-party / platform / OSS release. ARCHIVE = converted historical record, not new live work.

claimType.description: What kind of claim the finding makes (drives how it is verified).

surface.description: File path, command path, plan path, or tracker surface being audited.

evidence.description: Concrete proof: file:line, command output, or artifact path.

requiredAction.description: What the finding demands. archive-only = historical conversion; no-action = an observation (INFO).

artifacts.description: Optional map of artifact role -> path (findings, scorecard, research, catalog) when those run-dir artifacts exist. Run-dir layout: see skill-graph/lib/audit/run-layout.js (ADR-0016 surface #3).

sourceRef.description: Linear task, archive doc section, or session-log source the finding traces to.

migratedFrom.description: Optional legacy source when converted from an older audit system (use with pipeline: legacy-474-archive / v2.1-compat).
